title: Core Operations on a Singly Linked List
description: A flowchart illustrating the fundamental operations (Insertion, Deletion, Traversal, Search) performed on a singly linked list and the logic paths involved in handling different cases.
relationships: Operation Selection branches to Insertion, Deletion, Traversal, or Search
Insertion and Deletion lead to Case Handling
Case Handling leads to Update Pointers
Traversal and Search lead directly to End
